title: SwarmKitApprovalPolicy
description: Per-gate multi-party approval policy: the rules (a governance scope + a group of roles + a quorum mode) that must ALL be satisfied for the gate to advance, plus segregation-of-duties controls. Embedded config consumed by approval gates — not a standalone artifact (no apiVersion/kind). See design/details/multi-party-approval.md.

rules.description: Every rule must be satisfied for the gate to advance.

exclude_author.description: Default true. The identity that authored/submitted the artifact cannot approve it (segregation of duties).

on_revision.description: Default reset_all. What a revision does to prior approvals: reset_all invalidates all; reconfirm_changed keeps approvals whose scope was not affected.

min_distinct_approvers.description: Optional four-eyes floor: at least N distinct human identities must approve across all completed role-tasks, regardless of how roles overlap.

scope.description: The authority exercised by this rule. Every role in `roles` must confer it (validated against the role registry at load time).

roles.description: The group of roles that may exercise this rule's scope.

quorum.description: all = every role in the group must approve; any = one role suffices; {k-of: N} = any N distinct role-holders.
